response.justification: Despite extensive experience, Bogdan is overqualified and misaligned with the junior/mid-level role; his resume shows senior/staff-level responsibilities since 2014, with no indication of seeking a stepping-stone position, and his German language proficiency is only basic despite high on-site requirements in Berlin.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and Node.js experience across multiple projects
Proven full-stack capabilities with React, REST APIs, and PostgreSQL alternatives
Demonstrated passion for clean architecture and knowledge sharing
concerns: Overqualified for entry-level role with 10+ years of senior experience
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site presence requirement in Berlin
Focus on DLang, embedded, and AI-agent systems may distract from core platform needs
